title: Cyber-Sovereign Proof Benchmark Market
short: Cyber-sovereign work becomes a replayable proof benchmark market with reproduction receipts.
problem: Architecture is not enough. The execution moat becomes real when results can be benchmarked, replayed, reviewed, challenged, reproduced, settled, and admitted into future context.
mission: Create a cyber-sovereign proof benchmark market: define authorized defensive tasks, run parallel specialist-agent missions, validate outputs through evaluator harnesses, require red-team challenge, collect independent reproduction receipts, settle through AGIALPHA, and chronicle selected artifacts.
why: This card is the strongest execution-moat card because it converts proof architecture into a market-readable standard for replayable results.
goals: turn cyber work into replayable proof
produce evidence that can be checked by others
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates benchmark mission budgets, builder claims, proof submissions, reviewer/red-team bonds, evaluator incentives, proof-card actions, settlement, and reputation-weighted routing.
rsi: Proof benchmark RSI means replayed, validated, and selected results can influence future missions; unreproduced results cannot.
evidence: Red-team or challenge report where applicable
